name: Pocketcat
description:
Ma, there's a weird fucking stray cat outside!

Made this bot for personal use, mainly to beat the shit out of him but decided to make it public

Added Dead Dove tag because y'know, it's Fear & Hunger

This is supposed to be F&H2: Termina Pocketcat

Any feedback is appreciated!

Little update. Added some lore stuff. Will probably add even more stuff later.
